title: mc.enhance - performance pack
description: Performance and quality of life optimizations - No bells and whistles.
body:
![A banner that says "what is the performance pack?"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pfW0ho8v/images/f5f9137f6a4bcf4a6932c803c6a6e32738b0a89a.png)

---

This modpack aims to squeeze out every ounce of performance from the original mc.enhance modpack by omitting all of the purely visual mods. This leaves the player with a balanced mix of performance and quality of life mods, all of which are client-side and multiplayer friendly.

I believe many of the mods in this pack should be included in the base game due to how useful they are. And although each mod may be small on their own, together they succeed in creating an enhanced vanilla-plus experience! Several mods provide information already in the game but in a more practical & appealing manner, making it both easier for new players to learn game mechanics and for veterans to utilize that info.

mc.enhance - performance pack will be updated weekly with backports arrriving soon!

---

![A banner that says "list of mods:"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pfW0ho8v/images/054a529ae14b910d24c97ceeca5023016f919f73.png)

<details>
<summary>Performance (17)</summary>

## Optimizations and bug fixes:

- **[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)** by thosea - *"Optimization mod that focuses on things other than rendering"*
- **[Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)** by ishland and duplexsystem - *"A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft."*
- **[Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)** by isxander - *"Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker"*
- **[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)** by juliand665 and LostLuma - *"Improve performance when Minecraft is in the background."*
- **[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)** by FoundationGames - *"Reduce FPS lag with block entities, as well as customize them with resource packs"*
- **[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)** by tr7zw - *"Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible"*
- **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)** by malte0811 - *"Memory usage optimizations"*
- **[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)** by RaphiMC - *"Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft"*
- **[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)** by astei - *"A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack"*
- **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)** by jellysquid3 and 2No2Name - *"No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod"*
- **[Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)** by FX and KingContaria - *"A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server"*
- **[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)** by embeddedt - *"All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs. Compatible with all your favorite performance mods!"*
- **[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)** by FX - *"A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance"*
- **[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)** by Steveplays - *"Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience."*
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** by jellysquid3 and IMS - *"A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance"*
- **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)** by FlashyReese - *"Features that shouldn't be in Sodium."*
- **[Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)** by ishland - *"A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts."*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Informational (13)</summary>

## Knowledge at your fingertips:

- **[AdvancementInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo)** by Giselbaer - *"Show more information about advancement requirements"*
- **[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)** by squeek502 - *"Food/hunger-related HUD improvements"*
- **[Armor Chroma for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-chroma-for-fabric)** by A5b84 - *"Fabric fork of Armor Chroma, adds different icons in the armor bar depending on the material and can display glint for enchanted items."*
- **[Beenfo](https://modrinth.com/plugin/beenfo)** by Giselbaer - *"Show number of bees and honey level in hives and nests"*
- **[Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud)** by Lortseam - *"Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount"*
- **[Better Ping Display [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)** by vladmarica - *"Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list"*
- **[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)** by TreyRuffy and cominixo - *"BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD."*
- **[Clean Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-tooltips)** by stal111 and CesarZorak - *"A small mod improving Tooltips by creating a clean and consistent look!"*
- **[Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)** by Darkhax - *"Provides a way to get enchantment descriptions from enchanted books."*
- **[Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info)** by A5b84 - *"Shows information (like enchantments) about the held item under its name."*
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** by Prospector, Terraformers, NeusFear, jackassmc, and modmuss50 - *"Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed."*
- **[Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)** by MisterPeModder - *"View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory"*
- **[Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars)** by A5b84 - *"Adds customizable bars to the status effects overlay to show the remaining duration of effects."*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Acoustical (3)</summary>

## Make the atmopshere a little more lively:

- **[AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)** by creativemd - *"#listentonature"*
- **[Drip Sounds (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds-fabric)** by PieKing1215 - *"Adds sounds for drip particles landing"*
- **[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)** by Sollace - *"..An Overly complicated Sound Mod..."*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Misc. (5)</summary>

## Other features you will love:

- **[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)** by Johni0702 - *"Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance"*
- **[Full Brightness Toggle](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-brightness-toggle)** by Serilum - *"Press G to toggle the brightness/gamma in-game to maximum and get night vision."*
- **[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)** by Aizistral and robotkoer - *"Makes chat unreportable (where possible)"*
- **[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)** by FlashyReese - *"Alternative Options Menu for Sodium"*
- **[WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom)** by Alexander01998 - *"WI Zoom is a Minecraft mod offering up to 50x zoom with smooth camera movement. Supports Fabric, NeoForge, and snapshots. Also works with OptiFine and Sodium."*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Dependencies (8)</summary>

## Make everything run properly:

- **[Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib)** by Darkhax - *"An open source library for other mods!"*
- **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** by shedaniel - *"Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods"*
- **[Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective)** by Serilum - *"Collective is a shared library with common code for all of Serilum's mods."*
- **[CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore)** by creativemd - *"A core mod"*
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** by sfPlayer1 and modmuss50 - *"Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain."*
- **[Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)** by Fuzs - *"Forge's whole config system provided to the Fabric ecosystem. Designed for a multiloader architecture."*
- **[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)** by comp500 - *"Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo"*
- **[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)** by isxander - *"A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft."*

</details>

![A player looks over hills and valleys in a savanna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pfW0ho8v/images/c87ff8a676d074c1b19416450120469518dee93d.png)

### Want some beautiful visuals too? Check out the original [mc.enhance pack!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mc.enhance)
